Searches Google Docs, Phab Wiki, Stack Overflow, ... etc.
An Engineer's Guide to the Galaxy
for i in {0..255} ; do printf "\x1b[38;5;${i}mcolour${i}\n"; done
Open Infra Portal of a Service
See Product Details by Its UUID

# uAlfred | Uber Alfred Workflow
An Alfred Workflow specifically designed to boost your productivity as an Uber engineer.
See the documentation at http://t.uber.com/ualfred
